videos.headline: Georgia survives scare from Florida
videos.description: Georgia gets a fourth-quarter comeback and beats Florida.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Georgia survives scare from Florida) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: No. 5 Georgia wrestles win away from hungry Gators
videos.description: RB Chauncey Bowen's 36-yard touchdown run with 4:59 remaining proves to be the difference as the Bulldogs rally in the fourth quarter to frustrate Florida, 24-20, in Jacksonville.

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton finds Dillon Bell for Georgia’s first TD vs. Florida
videos.description: Gunner Stockton fires a perfect dart to Dillon Bell, giving the Bulldogs the early lead over the Gators.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunner Stockton finds Dillon Bell for Georgia’s first TD vs. Florida) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Eugene Wilson hauls in 40-yard TD to bring Florida even
videos.description: Eugene Wilson gets the 40-yard strike from DJ Lagway, giving the Gators their first score of the game.

videos.headline: Emotions run high as Florida-Georgia ends in scuffle
videos.description: Tempers flare in the final seconds as Florida and Georgia players get into a scuffle following the Bulldogs’ 24-20 win.

videos.headline: Kirby Smart reflects on his 'cardiac kids' after comeback win vs. Florida
videos.description: Smart praises his players, calling them warriors as they fight back to earn another come from behind victory, this time taking down the Gators in the Florida-Georgia rivalry.

videos.headline: Devin Moore takes advantage of Georgia slip-up with early INT
